events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock God Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Sir Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Stones Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still rocking! Happy Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched in the USA
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV made its debut in the United States, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV's First Day
angles.copy: Remember when music television actually played music videos? It all started today in '81 as MTV launched with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis' groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released in the UK on this day in 1994, launching them to superstardom.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years ago today, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music forever. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on this day in 1969 in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. Which iconic performance would you have loved to see?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977. He would have been 91.

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: 49 years since we lost the King. Elvis Presley's music continues to define generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Remembering the influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who tragically passed away on this day in 1996. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Enduring Impact
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, the music world lost a legend. Remembering Tupac Shakur, whose powerful lyrics still resonate today.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Remembering guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day in 1970 at the age of 27. He would have been 84.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: The world lost a true innovator 56 years ago today. Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix. What's your favourite track?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released in the UK on this day in 1969, featuring that unforgettable zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road', an album that sounds as fresh today as it did in '69. What's your favourite side?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable lead singer of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude are as iconic as ever. What's your top Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still rocking the mic and bringing the swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK single released
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine's UK Release
angles.copy: 49 years ago, John Lennon's timeless message of peace, 'Imagine', was released as a single in the UK. A song that still resonates deeply.

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple introduced its revolutionary first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: iPod's Debut
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple unveiled the device that changed how we listen to music forever. What was on your first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today marks James Bond Day, celebrating the anniversary of the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 007 first hit the big screen. What's your favourite Bond film or theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the enduring legacy of John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of comedy. What's your favourite Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album'
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, famously known as 'The White Album', was released in the UK on this day in 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles unleashed the sprawling masterpiece that is 'The White Album'. A wild ride of musical exploration. What's your top track?
